mapper.sql: id, accid, user_id AS userId, pay_amount AS payAmount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT b.id id, b.address address, b.create_time createTime, a.pay_amount money, b.thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl FROM app_pay_amount_record as a LEFT JOIN app_accident_record AS b ON a.accid = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{id}

SELECT b.id id, b.address address, b.create_time createTime, a.pay_amount money, b.thumbnail_url thumbnailUrl FROM app_pay_amount_record as a LEFT JOIN app_accident_record AS b ON a.accid = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time,'%Y%m') = #{date}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') as thisMouth FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} GROUP BY thisMouth
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') as thisMouth FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y%m') = #{date} GROUP BY thisMouth
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount),0) FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 2 AND to_days(create_time) = to_days(now())
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount),0) FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 2 AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m')
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pay_amount),0) FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id}
